name: project-blueprint-engine
description: A Codex plugin that turns user intent into traceable Product, Project, Work, and Test trees, then controls staged execution, evidence, review, feedback, and revision through compatible PBE contracts.

interface.shortDescription: Tree-based product blueprint, execution, evidence, and revision control for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Project Blueprint Engine runs inside Codex as a tree-based development control workflow while preserving the existing RPD, WPD, VD, and ACEP compatibility terms. It grows product intent into a Product Tree, derives Project, Work, and Test views, routes active PBE work through state-aware CLI gates before ordinary coding, confirms UI/UX before implementation, converts visual UI changes into Visual Design Contract artifacts, derives concrete theme tokens and component style contracts from screenshots, references, interviews, existing screens, default theme, or waiver decisions, audits dependency impact before implementation scope, selects staged execution slices, validates schema and cross-artifact traceability, tracks evidence, requires visual audit before UI visual review closure, maps feedback to affected nodes, and creates bounded revision work through change and impact analysis.
capabilities: Visual Design Contract generation for UI visual work
Design token and component style contract generation
UI surface inventory and visual evidence audit
CLI-assisted PBE artifact validation and gate checks
